achievements.title: Full Belly Jacket I
achievements.description: Maintain a x256 score multiplier for 20 seconds in Stage 1 in Manpuku Mode (Normal or Hard difficulty with other settings on default). Doesn't count time before and after bosses when the gauge doesn't drain
achievements.author: tomojin
